zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley於大約1472年出生在英國肯特澤亞爾時，他的父親Lord John Theobald IV29歲，母親Lady Joan Nisell26歲。他於大約1497年與Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley在英國英格蘭肯特澤亞爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1546年6月16日在英國英格蘭肯特澤亞爾享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley于大约1472年出生在英国肯特澤亞爾时，他的父亲Lord John Theobald IV29岁，母亲Lady Joan Nisell26岁。他于大约1497年与Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley在英国英格兰肯特澤亞爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1546年6月16日在英国英格兰肯特澤亞爾享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特。

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and English: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements theud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The English surname represents a learned form, re-created from French Théobald. The usual medieval forms of the name in English and German were Tebald and Tibalt (Old French Teobaud, Tibaut). Compare Dewald and Diebold .

variants.name: Dewald
meanings: German: from the personal name Diebold, from Middle High German Dietbold, from Old High German diot ‘people, nation’ + bald ‘brave, strong’. As an American surname this is also an altered form of the cognate Theobald . Compare Davolt , Dawalt , Daywalt , Devault 3, and Dewalt 1.

History: One of the first Dewalds in North America was Johannes Michael Dewald from Medard, a village in the Palatinate, Germany, who arrived at Philadelphia, PA, in 1738 on the ship Glasgow. He married Maria Barbara Schmidt and settled in Berks County, PA. His father's surname was Theobald. Michael's descendants also bear some other altered forms of the surname, including Dewalt, Dawalt, and Davolt. — One of the earliest immigrants who bore the original German surname Dewald was Henry alias He(i)nrich Dewald from the Palatinate, Germany, who arrived in PA in 1766. His descendants mainly bear altered forms of the surname, especially Devault .

variants.name: Tidball
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): variant of   Theobald  .

variants.name: Tebbs
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of Tebb, which is usually from a pet form of the Middle English male personal name Tebbold (see Theobald ).

variants.name: Tipple
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the medieval personal name Tebald, Tibalt (see Theobald ).
German: nickname for a simple person, from Low German tippel ‘point, corner’ (a reference to the pointed shape of a fool's cap).
German: from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name, a pet form of   Dietrich  .

variants.name: Tibbs
meanings: English: variant of Tibb, from the Middle English personal name Tibbe, which was used in the 13th century as both male (from Tibald, see Theobald ) and female name (a shortened form of Tibot, a pet form of Isabel, see Tebbutt ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley was born about 1472, in Seal, Kent, England, his father, Lord John Theobald IV, was 29 and his mother, Lady Joan Nisell, was 26. He married Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley about 1497, in Seal, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 16 June 1546, in Seal, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley est né environ 1472, à Seal, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Lord John Theobald IV, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Nisell, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley environ 1497, à Seal, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 16 juin 1546, à Seal, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley um 1472 in Seal, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John Theobald IV 29 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Nisell 26. Er hat um 1497 in Seal, Kent, England, United Kingdom Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Juni 1546 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Seal, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley è nato il circa 1472 nel Seal, Kent, England, il suo padre, Lord John Theobald IV, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Nisell, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley circa 1497, nel Seal, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 16 giugno 1546, nel Seal, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepleyが約1472年にイギリスケントセアルで生まれた時，父Lord John Theobald IVは29歳，母Lady Joan Nisellは26歳であった。約1497年にイギリスイギリスケントセアルでLady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1546年6月16日にイギリスイギリスケントセアルで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley(이)가 대략 1472년 영국 켄트 시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John Theobald IV(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Nisell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 시에서 Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1546년 6월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 시에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley nasceu aproximadamente 1472, em Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John Theobald IV, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Nisell, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley aproximadamente 1497, em Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de junho de 1546, em Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley родился около 1472 г. в местности силь, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord John Theobald IV было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Nisell, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley около 1497 г. в местности силь, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 16 июня 1546 г. в местности силь, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley nació aproximadamente 1472, en Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord John Theobald IV, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Nisell, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley aproximadamente 1497, en Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 16 de junio de 1546, en Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
